name: my-devlog
description: AI-native interstitial journaling system for developers. Track daily work, bugs, learning, and ideas via Markdown bullet journals.

tools.name: my-devlog_write_record
tools.description: Append a record to today's DevLog daily log. Auto-detects symbol from content keywords.

tools.name: my-devlog_sync
tools.description: Sync today's daily log to projects/ and regenerate statistics.

tools.name: my-devlog_mark_done
tools.description: Mark a todo as done by keyword search in today's daily log.

tools.name: my-devlog_list_todos
tools.description: List all open (unfinished) todos for today.

tools.name: my-devlog_search
tools.description: Search daily logs by keyword, date range, or project tag.

tools.name: my-devlog_read_daily
tools.description: Read the daily log for a given date (default today).

tools.name: my-devlog_archive_inbox
tools.description: Archive inbox.md records into daily/ files by timestamp.

tools.name: my-devlog_generate_weekly
tools.description: Generate weekly report for the previous week.
